name: eole Inc.
summary: eole Inc. manages applications for PCs and smartphones in Japan. The company offers Easy contact network, a free group communication service; contact network application solutions; Gakuba, a part-time job site; and Raku-Raku Part-time Job, a recruitment portal site that allows to search and compare job offers. It is also involved in the Internet advertising business; development and provision of pinpoint, a private data management platform, as well as HR advertisement platform; and sales promotion business. The company was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
